hypotheses.market_logic: Prior H4 candle body >= X * ATR(14); trade in same direction only if regime agrees.
hypotheses.expected_failure_mode: Range-bound low-volatility sessions where strong bodies still revert.

hypotheses.market_logic: Prior H4 candle has a large wick (body / range <= wick_ratio) and closes back inside the prior bar's range; trade reversal.
hypotheses.expected_failure_mode: Trend continuation days where the wick is just a brief retest before the trend resumes.

hypotheses.market_logic: Previous H4 high or low is swept then reclaimed; trade back toward value/midpoint.
hypotheses.expected_failure_mode: Real breakouts where the sweep is the start of a new leg, not a stop hunt.

hypotheses.market_logic: Trade shallow-to-deep retracement of previous H4 candle only when trend/regime agrees.
hypotheses.expected_failure_mode: Deep retracements that turn into full reversals -- 32% of bars retrace fully.

hypotheses.market_logic: Asia session compresses into a tight range; London or NY session breaks the range with displacement.
hypotheses.expected_failure_mode: Fakeout breakouts during low-impact news; range expands then immediately reverses.

hypotheses.market_logic: Price extends > N std from VWAP/MA in a range regime; fade back to mean.
hypotheses.expected_failure_mode: Trending regime where the extension keeps extending instead of reverting.

hypotheses.market_logic: After a low-ATR-percentile compression, an ATR expansion bar breaks out; trade continuation.
hypotheses.expected_failure_mode: Late entries after the move has already spent most of its ATR.
